displayName: [Baseline] Require password change for high-risk users

_metadata.purpose: When a user's overall risk score reaches High (multiple risky sign-ins, leaked credential, or password spray detected against them), require MFA + force password change at next sign-in.
deployment_notes: Requires Entra ID P2 licensing for user risk evaluation.
passwordChange control forces the user to change password on the spot before access proceeds.
After remediation completes, Identity Protection automatically lowers user risk.
